message:
feat(swarm): add swarm_pipeline module for DAG-ordered fleet orchestration

New 1989-line module implementing a swarm-native pipeline runtime with
hooks and recovery policies for agent fleet orchestration:

Key abstractions:
- PipelineDefinition: declarative multi-step pipeline with DAG ordering
- PipelineStep: individual unit of work with dependencies, timeout,
  and recovery policy
- RecoveryPolicy: exponential backoff, circuit breaker, fallback chain
  with configurable max retries, base delay, jitter, and thresholds
- CompensatingAction: partial failure rollback for completed steps
- WorkflowHook + HookRegistry: extensible hook system with phases
  (PipelineStart/End, PreStep/PostStep, PreRecovery/PostRecovery,
  PreCompensation/PostCompensation)
- PipelineExecutor: tracks step outcomes, fires hooks, handles
  step dependencies, orchestrates recovery and compensation

Comprehensive inline test suite included.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
